com.tonic.jaloc.impl.lists

Class PStructList<T extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeList<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.lists.PStructList<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable, java.lang.Iterable<T>

    public final class PStructList<T extends PStruct>
extends AbstractNativeList<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
implements java.lang.Iterable<T>
    A growable native struct list; elements are accessed through views, and any capacity change invalidates outstanding views.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PStructList(NativeAllocator allocator, StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.
      PStructList(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory)
      Creates an empty list with zero capacity on the system allocator.
      PStructList(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T add()
      Appends a zeroed element and returns its view.
      T add(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
      Appends an element, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
      java.util.Iterator<T> cursorIterator()
      Iterates through one reusable view; do not hold it across next() calls.
      T get(long index)
      Creates a view of the element at index.
      @NotNull java.util.Iterator<T> iterator() 
      StructLayout layout() 
      void removeLast()
      Removes the last element, zeroing its slot.
      void sort(java.util.Comparator<? super T> comparator)
      Sorts the live range by comparator.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeList

        clear, ensureCapacity, trimToSize

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach, spliterator

    • Constructor Detail

      • PStructList

        public PStructList(StructLayout layout,
                   StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory)
        Creates an empty list with zero capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views

      • PStructList

        public PStructList(StructLayout layout,
                   StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                   long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

      • PStructList

        public PStructList(NativeAllocator allocator,
                   StructLayout layout,
                   StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                   long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

    • Method Detail

      • layout

        public StructLayout layout()
        Returns:
        the entry layout

      • add

        public T add()
        Appends a zeroed element and returns its view.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • add

        public T add(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
        Appends an element, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
        Parameters:
        initializer - fills the fresh element
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if initializer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public T get(long index)
        Creates a view of the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        a fresh view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • removeLast

        public void removeLast()
        Removes the last element, zeroing its slot.
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • sort

        public void sort(java.util.Comparator<? super T> comparator)
        Sorts the live range by comparator.
        Parameters:
        comparator - the ordering
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if comparator is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • iterator

        @NotNull
public @NotNull java.util.Iterator<T> iterator()
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.lang.Iterable<T extends PStruct>

      • cursorIterator

        public java.util.Iterator<T> cursorIterator()
        Iterates through one reusable view; do not hold it across next() calls.
        Returns:
        the iterator
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
